positive: Retro-futuristic cityscape viewed from a cyberpunk rooftop at night. Neon signs reflect on wet pavement, flying vehicles zip through the canyons of skyscrapers. Style: Synthwave aesthetic, highly detailed linework, vibrant teal and magenta palette, vaporwave glow.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, washed out, amateur drawing, sketch
